title: What's New With VISs | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
he previous editions may be used until exhausted.
2022 
November 16, 2022 
Updated Smallpox/Monkeypox VIS Now Available 
An updated Vaccine Information Statement for Smallpox/Monkeypox vaccine has been posted on November 16, 2022. We encourage providers to begin using this VIS immediately, but stocks of the previous edition may be used until exhausted.
August 23, 2022 
Updated Smallpox/Monkeypox VIS Now Available 
An updated Vaccine Information Statement for Smallpox/Monkeypox vaccine has been posted on August 23, 2022. We encourage providers to begin using this VIS immediately, but stocks of the previous edition may be used until exhausted.
June 30, 2022 
New Ebola VIS Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for Ebola vaccine has been posted on June 30, 2022. It may be used starting immediately.
June 2, 2022 
Updated Rabies VIS Now Available 
An updated VIS for rabies vaccine has been posted on June 2, 2022. We encourage providers to begin using this VIS immediately, but stocks of the previous edition may be used until exhausted.
June 1, 2022 
New Smallpox/Monkeypox VIS Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for Smallpox/Monkeypox vaccine has been posted on June 1, 2022. It may be used starting immediately.
February 4, 2022 
New PCV VIS and Updated Zoster/Shingles (Recombinant) VISs Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for pneumococcal conj
